temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit room, Ross, wearing a pink plaid shirt, looks at Chandler with a surprised expression. Chandler, in a blue plaid shirt, is looking down at something in his hands. Ross says, 'Fred?' (Storyline: The scene begins with Ross questioning Chandler about something, setting up a comedic misunderstanding.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Questioning, slightly confused. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) Chandler looks up, points a finger in the air, and smiles, exclaiming, 'Score!' The on-screen text 'CO-EXECUTIVE PRODUCER ANDREW REICH' appears in a handwritten-style font over the shot. (Storyline: Chandler reveals he has successfully tricked Ross, celebrating his victory in their game.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Triumphant, playful. 2) Background sounds or music: A faint laugh track is heard.)
